content: ngrok: HTTP/HTTPS/TCP tunneling, dev inspect UI at localhost:4040, request replay, instant public URLs/subdomains, webhook testing. Cloudflare Tunnel: reverse proxy daemon (cloudflared), outbound-only connection (no inbound port needed), custom domains via DNS, WAF/DDoS protection, Cloudflare Access for auth, real-time logs/analytics, single tunnel routing multiple apps. Key shared pattern: daemon on local machine creates outbound connection to relay, relay handles inbound requests - NAT traversal by design.
